content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_RMAs
-- drop view v_RMAs
-- 1700
as
SELECT      DISTINCT OCH.REPN as             [RMA Number]
,            TRY_CAST(
                LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), NULLIF(OCH.EPDT, 0)), 4) + '-' +  
                SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), NULLIF(OCH.EPDT, 0)), 5, 2) + '-' + 
                RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), NULLIF(OCH.EPDT, 0)), 2) AS DATE) AS [RMA Date]
--,           CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OCH.EPDT,0) AS varchar(MAX)) AS DATE) as             [RMA Date]
,           OCH.RERE as             [Responsible]
,           OC.CUNO as              [Customer Number]
,           OC.CUNM as              [Customer Name]
,           OCL.RSCD as             [Reason Code]
,           CASE WHEN OCL.RSCD = '' THEN 'Undefined' 
            else CS.TX40 END as     [Reason Description]
,           OCL.WHLO as             [Warehouse]
,           OCH.YREF as             [Reference 1]
,           OCH.RESL as             [Low Status]
,           OCH.RESH as             [High Status]
,           OCH.CRSB as             [Low Credit Status]
,           OCH.CRSH as             [High Credit Status]
,           OCH.RORN as             [Sales Order]
,           OCL.RELI as             [Line Number]
,           OCL.ITNO as             [Item Number]
,           MM.ITDS as              [Item Name]
,           MM.ITCL as              [Brand]
,           OCL.SERN as             [Serial Number]
,           OCL.REQ0/CASE WHEN (COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI)) = 0 then 1 else COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI) end as             [Notified Qty]
,           OCL.REQ1/CASE WHEN (COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI)) = 0 then 1 else COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI) end as             [Returned Qty]
,           OCL.SAPR as             [Unit Price]
,           OCL.REQ2 as             [Inspect Qty]
,           (OCL.SAPR*OCL.REQ1)/CASE WHEN (COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI)) = 0 then 1 else COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI) end as    [Return Amt]
,           (OCL.SAPR*OCL.REQ0)/CASE WHEN (COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI)) = 0 then 1 else COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI) end as    [Notified Amt]
,           OCL.RPA5 as             [Inspection Officer]
,           OCL.REQ3/CASE WHEN (COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI)) = 0 then 1 else COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI) end as             [Approved Qty]
,           OCL.REQ4 as             [Returned to Supplier Qty]
,           OCL.REQ5 as             [Returned to Customer Qty]
,           OCL.REQ8 as             [Repairable Qty]
,           OCL.REQ6 as             [Rejected Qty]
,           OCL.REQ7 as             [Credited Qty]
--,           OH.ORNO as              [Credit Memo]
--,           FS.CINO as              [Invoice]
--,           OH.CUOR as              [Customer PO]
,           ISNULL(OH.ORNO, OH2.ORNO) as              [Credit Memo]
,           ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO) as              [Invoice]
,           ISNULL(OH.CUOR, OH2.CUOR) as              [Customer PO]
FROM        M3.OCHEAD OCH
JOIN        M3.OCLINE OCL on OCH.REPN = OCL.REPN
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC on OCH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM on OCL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS on OCL.RSCD = CS.STKY and CS.STCO = 'RSCD'
LEFT JOIN   M3.OOLINE OH ON OCH.REPN = RIGHT(OH.OFNO,9) AND OCL.ITNO = OH.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.ODHEAD OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.FSLEDG FS ON OD.EXIN = FS.CINO AND OD.CUNO = FS.CUNO AND FS.TRCD = 10
LEFT JOIN   M3.OOLINE OH2 on OCH.REPN = OH2.REPN AND OCL.ITNO = OH2.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.ODHEAD OD2 ON OH2.ORNO = OD2.ORNO AND LEFT(OH2.ORNO,1) = '5'
LEFT JOIN   M3.FSLEDG FS2 ON OD2.EXIN = FS2.CINO AND OD2.CUNO = FS2.CUNO AND FS2.TRCD = 10

UNION ALL

SELECT      'Blanket RMA' as [RMA Number]
,           OH.ORDT as [RMA Date]
,           OH.RESP as [Responsible]
,           OC.CUNO as [Customer Number]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           NULL as [Reason Code]
,           NULL as [Reason Description]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           NULL as [Reference 1]
,           NULL as [Low Status]
,           NULL as [High Status]
,           OL.ORST as [Low Credit Status]
,           NULL as [High Credit Status]
,           OH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,           OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           MM.ITDS as [Item Name]
,           MM.ITCL as [Brand]
,           NULL as [Serial Number]
,           NULL as [Notified Qty]
,           (OL.ORQT * -1) as [Returned Qty]
,           OL.NEPR as [Unit Price]
,           NULL as [Inspect Qty]
,           (OL.ORQT * -1) * OL.NEPR as [Return Amt]
,           NULL as [Notified Amt]
,           NULL as [Inspection Officer]
,           NULL as [Approved Qty]
,           NULL as [Returned to Supplier Qty]
,           NULL as [Returned to Customer Qty]
,           NULL as [Repairable Qty]
,           NULL as [Rejected Qty]
,           (OL.ORQT * -1) as  [Credited Qty]
,           OH.ORNO as [Credit Memo]
,           LE.CINO as [Invoice]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE --26749
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN --15784
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.CUNO = ODH.CUNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH ON ODH.ORNO = OH.ORNO
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS MM ON ODL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE           OH.ORTP = 'RMA'
